title: The Two Meters
author: Meridian
medium: Astro / twin-invoice register over build-time data — the reporters' own disclosed Scope 2 tables, recomputed
embodies: Puts the GHG Protocol Scope 2 dual-reporting standard on trial by rendering both of its mandated meters as paired invoices — AS REPORTED (market-based) vs AS THE GRID SAW IT (location-based) — from Microsoft's and Google's own disclosed tables, so the discretion the standard grants (which meter anchors the public goal story) is experienced as the widening difference between two bills for the same consumption; every derived figure carries its arithmetic on the face of the work.
